offline_desc: The Trending section requires an internet connection to fetch updates.
config_desc: To view trending games you need to add your RAWG API key.
api_desc: The RAWG server did not respond properly.
error_msg_backup_export_failed: Failed to export backup. Please try again.
error_msg_backup_import_failed: Failed to import backup. Check the file and try again.
error_msg_backup_invalid_file: Invalid file. Please select a valid Playlite backup.
error_msg_backup_incompatible_version: Backup version is not compatible with this app version.
error_msg_mutex_lock: Please try again in a few seconds.
error_msg_steam_keys_required: Please fill and save your Steam keys first.
error_msg_render_function_error: Logic error: an invalid function was called.
error_msg_render_generic_error: An unexpected error occurred in the UI.
error_msg_database_error: There was a problem saving to local disk.
error_msg_launcher_not_found: Launcher not installed or incorrect location. Ensure it is installed or provide the directory manually.
error_msg_launcher_no_games: No games found. Make sure you have installed games.
error_msg_launcher_invalid_path: The provided directory does not contain a valid launcher installation.
error_msg_launcher_config_unreadable: Unable to read the launcher's configuration files.
error_msg_permission_denied_launcher: Permission denied when accessing launcher files.
